internacional.title: Christina Marie Plante: 5 things about Arizona woman who went missing in 1994 and was found three decades later
internacional.description: Christina Marie Plante, from Arizona, disappeared when she was 13 only to be found over three decades later, living a different life.  | World News

internacional.title: Trump meets with NATO leader Mark Rutte as he muses about pulling out of the military alliance
internacional.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio met separately with Rutte on Wednesday morning at the State Department ahead of the White House talks. | World News

internacional.title: Lebanon clouds Iran-US ceasefire ahead of talks: Is it included or not? Explained
internacional.description: Israel's claim that Lebanon was not covered in the two-week ceasefire deal was also backed by United States President Donald Trump and Vice President JD Vance. | World News

financeiro.title: Galípolo na CPI: Apoio de Lula e Caso Master
financeiro.description: Gabriel Galípolo, presidente do BC, afirma ter total autonomia de Lula para lidar com a liquidação do Banco Master durante sua participação na CPI do Senado.

financeiro.title: Defensoria cobra providências do Banco Central após instituições recusarem cédulas válidas
financeiro.description: Agência bancária e cooperativa de crédito rejeitam receber cédulas que o BC considera válidas; prática afeta o comércio local, impedindo a circulação do dinheiro

financeiro.title: Lula aconselha Moraes sobre julgamento do Master
financeiro.description: Lula orienta Alexandre de Moraes a se declarar impedido no julgamento do Banco Master, alertando sobre os riscos à sua biografia e à imagem do STF.
